note: QUARANTINE - instrument error, NOT service downtime. These slots were recorded as code 4 (svc-outage) by a probe that could not read history at all: minds-cli 0.1.3 (published 2026-07-21T09:16:10Z) renamed the history field partyType -> senderType, so filter(m => m.partyType === 0) silently returned [] on every poll. The agent in fact replied to every one of these probes (verified against the full conversation). Frozen for audit; nothing reads this file.
rows_schema: [epoch_seconds, code, value] - code 4 was recorded, but the true code is 6 (unmeasured)
